source_recall.pass: find >= 30% of ground truth orgs OR find >= 1 org with RA synovial specimens
source_recall.notes: Pipeline may also surface R4RA, SERA, or TACERA RA cohorts — those are valid academic finds but physical specimen re-access requires separate negotiation. Stibion specializes in autoimmune and may be harder to find via PubMed.

checks: every [documented] claim has verbatim quote + source ID
specimen counts cite a source, never estimated from training data

pillar_coverage_per_source.pass: mean >= 40% of available fields filled per source

checks: every claim carries one of the 4 labels
every [verified]/[unverified] cites the [documented] facts it's based on
hypotheses state what verification was attempted

BIOMEDICA CRO.note: Procurement CRO with hospital network — good contact, weak clinical annotation depth

Stibion.note: Autoimmune specialist — may have better collection protocol documentation than general biobanks

NDRI.note: Established nonprofit — good contact, synovial biopsy is not core collection focus

score_calibration.pass: mean absolute error <= 1.0 per criterion vs expected range

must_flag_as_unknown.reason: RF not tracked in biospecimen registries — requires clinical record linkage
Anti-CCP not tracked in biospecimen registries — requires clinical record linkage
Medication history not tracked in specimen registries — requires clinical record access
Treatment-naive RA enrolled in clinical trials, not commercial biobanks — structural scarcity
not in any public registry — requires direct inquiry

gap_honesty.fail: < 30% flagged (system presents incomplete picture as complete)

aminochain_orgs.BIOMEDICA CRO: synovial biopsy availability and RF/anti-CCP status unknown
aminochain_orgs.Stibion: synovial biopsy availability and RF/anti-CCP status unknown
aminochain_orgs.NDRI: synovial biopsy availability and RF/anti-CCP status unknown

ground_truth_overlap.pass: at least 1 recommended source overlaps with AminoChain orgs OR surfaces a credible academic RA cohort with specimen access

checks: no invented RF or anti-CCP status without a clinical source
no invented medication history without clinical record citation
no invented contacts — every email traces to paper/website/registry
no training-data fills for synovial biopsy protocol specifics
